photo_direction.subject: Completed roof in good weather. Crew visible but not posed. Actual job site preferred.
photo_direction.angle: Low-angle looking up at the roofline to convey scale.
photo_direction.lighting: Golden hour or overcast preferred. Avoid harsh midday shadows.
photo_direction.overlay_purpose: Darken enough to keep white text readable at WCAG AA (4.5:1 minimum).

tone: Calm authority. The homeowner is spending $15k+. The hero should feel like the company has done this a thousand times.
